Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Let's now look at our Echo-class cruise missile submarine K-175. Select it from Formation Manager or Tactical Display, then open its Unit Reference to review it.

The Echo-class is an older class of cruise missile submarine which carries 8 x SS-N-3 Shaddock anti-ship missiles. These are the same type of missiles carried aboard Varyag. As these are an older type of missile, we need to coordinate a Time on Target attack between our submarine and our cruiser to ensure we destroy the Americans.

Note: the K-175 must be surfaced to fire its missiles, and must remain on the surface with its targeting radar enabled to provide midcourse guidance to its missiles. Also, it can only direct four missiles at once.
